description: Shortened low-yield-first interview to 4 turns. Pure background — onset question is NOT reached. Tests whether V17 drift emerges in a short conversation that never asks focal symptom questions.
source: Phase 2 plan §8.2 Condition B, truncated to 4 turns for turn-count sensitivity.
questions: Hello, I'm your doctor today. Can you tell me what brought you to the ED?
Can you tell me about your past medical history?
Do you live alone or with someone?
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
